sectionTitle: More on the Story of Taiwan | 再談台灣故事

samples.pinyin: tiānsè zhújiàn ànle xiàlái.
samples.en: The sky gradually darkened.

samples.pinyin: lèguān zhèng zhújiàn tìdài bēiguān.
samples.en: Optimism is gradually replacing pessimism.

samples.pinyin: bēnxí díjūn jùdiǎn
samples.en: Make a long-range raid on an enemy stronghold

samples.pinyin: duóqǔ dírén de jùdiǎn
samples.en: Capture an enemy stronghold

samples.sentence: 這個皇朝統治了數百年。
samples.pinyin: zhège huángcháo tǒngzhìle shù bǎi nián.
samples.en: This dynasty ruled for hundreds of years.
samples.vi: Triều đại này đã cai trị hàng trăm năm.

samples.sentence: 統治階級製定了新的法律。
samples.pinyin: tǒngzhì jiējí zhìdìngle xīn de fǎlǜ.
samples.en: The ruling class enacted new laws.
samples.vi: Giai cấp thống trị đã ban hành luật mới.

samples.pinyin: zhège jǐngdiǎn hěn yǒumíng.
samples.en: This tourist attraction is very famous.
samples.vi: Điểm tham quan này rất nổi tiếng.

samples.pinyin: wǒmen qù jǐngdiǎn pāizhào.
samples.en: Let's go take pictures at the scenic spot.
samples.vi: Chúng tôi đi chụp ảnh ở khu du lịch.

samples.sentence: 到1988年為止經濟一直很繁榮。
samples.pinyin: dào 1988 nián wéizhǐ jīng jǐ yīzhí hěn fánróng.
samples.en: By 1988 the economy was booming.

samples.sentence: 希望中國更加繁榮昌盛。
samples.pinyin: xīwàng zhōngguó gèngjiā fánróng chāngshèng.
samples.en: I hope China will be more prosperous.

samples.sentence: 這個港口連接著國際航線。
samples.pinyin: zhège gǎngkǒu liánjiēzhe guójì hángxiàn.
samples.en: This port connects to international shipping routes.
samples.vi: Cảng này kết nối với các tuyến hàng hải quốc tế.

samples.sentence: 他們在港口建設新的倉庫。
samples.pinyin: tāmen zài gǎngkǒu jiànshè xīn de cāngkù.
samples.en: They are building a new warehouse at the port.
samples.vi: Họ đang xây dựng kho hàng mới tại cảng.

samples.meaning: it is said; it is reported
samples.pinyin: jùshuō kǒngzǐ yǒu sānqiān dìzǐ.
samples.en: It is said that Confucius had three thousand disciples.
samples.vi: Người nói Khổng Tử có ba nghìn đệ tử.

samples.meaning: it is said; it is reported
samples.sentence: 據説那傢餐廳很好吃/喫。
samples.pinyin: jùshuō nà jiā cāntīng hěn hǎo chī.
samples.en: It is said that the food at that restaurant is very delicious.

samples.pinyin: gōng lù
samples.en: Stag; buck

samples.pinyin: mǔ lù
samples.en: Doe

samples.pinyin: guǎngchǎng shàng yǒuyī dàqún rén.
samples.en: There is a large crowd in the square.

samples.sentence: 這座城市有許多樓群/羣。
samples.pinyin: zhè zuò chéngshì yǒu xǔduō lóu qún.
samples.en: This city has many building complexes.

samples.sentence: 菠蘿的形狀是圓柱形的。
samples.pinyin: bōluó de xíngzhuàng shì yuánzhù xíng de.
samples.en: The shape of the pineapple is cylindrical.
samples.vi: Hình dạng của quả dứa là hình trụ.

samples.sentence: 這個盒子的形狀很獨特。
samples.pinyin: zhège hézi de xíngzhuàng hěn dútè.
samples.en: The appearance of this box is very unique.

samples.sentence: 他的傢裡/裏掛了一對鹿角。
samples.pinyin: tā de jiālǐ guàle yī duì lùjiǎo.
samples.en: He has a pair of deer antlers hanging in his house.

samples.sentence: 村裡/裏老人在收集鹿角。
samples.pinyin: cūn lǐ lǎo rén zài shōu jí lù jiǎo
samples.en: The village elders are collecting deer antlers.

samples.pinyin: wǒ shùnbiàn qù kàn kàn tā.
samples.en: I’ll visit him along the way.

samples.pinyin: nǐ dé biàn huí wǒ xiāoxi.
samples.en: Reply to me when it's convenient.

samples.pinyin: wǒmen dōu chēng tā lǎo lǐ.
samples.en: We all call him Old Li.
samples.vi: Chúng tôi đều gọi anh ấy là Lão Lý.

samples.pinyin: zhè zhònghuā chēngwéi méiguī.
samples.en: This kind of flower is called a rose.
samples.vi: Loại hoa này gọi là hoa hồng.

samples.sentence: 我們計劃下週去動物園。
samples.pinyin: wǒmen jìhuà xià zhōu qù dòngwùyuán.
samples.en: We plan to visit the zoo next week.

samples.sentence: 動物園裡/裏有很多珍稀動物。
samples.pinyin: dòngwùyuán lǐ yǒu hěnduō zhēnxī dòngwù.
samples.en: The zoo has many rare animals.

samples.pinyin: tā de pífū hěn guānghuá.
samples.en: His skin is very smooth.
samples.vi: Da của anh ấy rất mịn màng.

samples.pinyin: tā de pí xìnì báixī.
samples.en: Her skin is delicate and fair.
samples.vi: Da của cô ấy mịn màng và trắng.

samples.pinyin: wǒmen shā jīle.
samples.en: We killed a chicken.
samples.vi: Chúng tôi đã giết gà.

samples.pinyin: shìbīng shā dí.
samples.en: Soldiers kill the enemy.
samples.vi: Người lính giết kẻ địch.

samples.sentence: 我們要的是質量而不是數量。
samples.pinyin: wǒmen yào de shì zhìliàng ér bùshì shùliàng.
samples.en: We prefer quality to quantity.

samples.pinyin: tāmen de shēngchǎn shùliàng yǒuxiàn.
samples.en: They are produced in limited quantities.

samples.pinyin: xiùlì de fēngguāng lìng wǒ táozuì.
samples.en: The beautiful scenery intoxicated me.

samples.pinyin: nà shì shǎngxīnyuèmù dì fēngguāng.
samples.en: That is a pleasing scenery.

samples.pinyin: Nà dòng lǎo jiù mín zhái dài xiū shàn.
samples.en: That old private residence is awaiting repairs.

samples.pinyin: tā yìnggāi shì sī chuǎng le mínzhái
samples.en: Looks like he broke into a house.

samples.pinyin: wǒ chāo ài chī ézǐ jiān.
samples.en: I absolutely love eating oyster omelet.
samples.vi: Tôi rất thích ăn trứng tráng hàu.

samples.pinyin: zhè fèn ézǐ jiān zhēnshi měiwèi.
samples.en: This oyster omelet is really delicious.
samples.vi: Món trứng tráng hàu này thật ngon.

samples.meaning: may also indicate that one is stating a fact that the other person is not aware of
samples.pinyin: tā shì wǒ de lǎoshī o.
samples.en: He is my teacher, you know.

samples.meaning: may also indicate that one is stating a fact that the other person is not aware of
samples.pinyin: zhèlǐ bùnéng pāizhào o.
samples.en: You can't take photos here, just so you know.

samples.pinyin: gāi shuō de yīdìng yào shuō.
samples.en: What should be said must be said.
samples.vi: Điều cần nói nhất định phải nói.

samples.pinyin: nǐ lèile, gāi xiūxi yīxiàle.
samples.en: You are tired, you should take a rest.
samples.vi: Anh mệt rồi, cần nghỉ ngơi một chút.

samples.pinyin: gōngsī yèwù rìyì xīngshèng.
samples.en: The company’s business is flourishing day by day.
samples.vi: Việc kinh doanh của công ty ngày càng phát triển mạnh mẽ.

samples.sentence: 這個城市的經濟很興盛。
samples.pinyin: zhège chéngshì de jīngjì hěn xīngshèng.
samples.en: The economy of this city is very prosperous.
samples.vi: Nền kinh tế thành phố này rất phồn vinh.

samples.pinyin: chūnqiū zhànguó shíqī.
samples.en: The Spring and Autumn Period and the Warring States.
samples.vi: Thời Xuân Thu Chiến Quốc.

samples.pinyin: zhège shíqī hěn zhòngyào.
samples.en: This period is very important.

samples.pinyin: Wǒmen zuò zhe dú mù zhōu dù hú
samples.en: We sat in a dugout canoe crossing the lake

samples.pinyin: wǒmen bù xūyào dúmùzhōu
samples.en: I don't think we need a canoe.

samples.pinyin: wǒmen yīnggāi jìnlì ér wéi.
samples.en: We should do our best.
samples.vi: Chúng ta nên làm hết sức mình.

samples.pinyin: zhège xiàngmù dàyǒukěwéi.
samples.en: This project has great potential.
samples.vi: Dự án này rất đáng làm.

samples.meaning: convey by vehicles, ships, etc,; transport; carry
samples.sentence: 這條船可載運乘客500多人。
samples.pinyin: zhè tiáo chuán kě zài yùn chéng kè 500 duō rén.
samples.en: The ship carries more than five hundred passengers.

samples.sentence: 擅自要求查莉改名字我很抱歉。
samples.pinyin: shànzì yàoqíu chálì gǎimíngzì wǒ hěn bàoqiàn
samples.en: I'm sorry about changing Charlie's name.

samples.pinyin: tāmen liǎ zhǎng de hěn xiāngsì.
samples.en: The two of them look very similar.
samples.vi: Hai bọn họ trông rất giống nhau.

samples.pinyin: tā de jīnglì hé wǒ hěn xiāngsì.
samples.en: Her experiences are very similar to mine.
samples.vi: Trải nghiệm của cô ấy giống tôi.

samples.sentence: 他齣生於一個沒落的封建傢庭。
samples.pinyin: tā chūshēng yú yī ge mòluò de fēngjiàn jiātíng.
samples.en: He was born in a declining feudal family.

samples.sentence: 這一文學流派從此日趨沒落。
samples.pinyin: Zhè yī wénxué liúpài cóngcǐ rìqū mòluò.
samples.en: This school of literature has since been on the wane.

samples.pinyin: tā de tàidù yīrán jiānjué.
samples.en: He is still very determined
samples.vi: Thái độ của anh ấy vẫn kiên quyết.

samples.pinyin: tā yīrán zài nǔlì gōngzuò.
samples.en: She is still working hard.
samples.vi: Cô ấy vẫn đang cố gắng làm việc.

samples.pinyin: wǒmen yào bǎoliú zhège jiàn zhù.
samples.en: We need to retain this building.

samples.pinyin: qǐng bǎoliú fángjiān de géjú.
samples.en: Please retain the layout of the room.

samples.meaning: Lukang town in Changhua county 彰化县, Taiwan
samples.pinyin: Wǒ qù guò Lùgǎng lǚyóu.
samples.en: I have been to Lukang for travel.
samples.vi: Tôi đã từng đi du lịch Lộc Cảng.

samples.meaning: Mengjia (also written Monga, Monka or Bangka), the pre-Japanese-era name for Wanhua 万华, the oldest district of Taipei
samples.sentence: 我傢住在艋舺老街附近。
samples.pinyin: wǒ jiā zhù zài měng jiǎ lǎo jiē fù jìn
samples.en: I live near Mengjia Old Street

samples.meaning: weak; bland; tasteless; without enough salt
samples.pinyin: zhè tāng wèidào yǒudiǎn dànle.
samples.en: The soup tastes a bit bland.
samples.vi: Món canh này vị hơi nhạt.

samples.meaning: weak; bland; tasteless; without enough salt
samples.pinyin: cǐ zhǒng chá dàn'érwúwèi ya.
samples.en: This type of tea is bland and tasteless.
samples.vi: Loại trà này nhạt không có mùi vị gì cả.

samples.meaning: Wanhua district of Taipei City 台北市, Taiwan
samples.sentence: 萬華是一個美麗的城市。
samples.pinyin: Wànhuá shì yí gè měilì de chéngshì.
samples.en: Wanhua is a beautiful city.
samples.vi: Vạn Hoa là một thành phố xinh đẹp.

samples.pinyin: wǒ huì shuō yì diǎn tái yǔ la
samples.en: I can speak a little Taiwanese.

samples.pinyin: tā jīhū bù huì shuō rìyǔ.
samples.en: He speaks little Japanese.

samples.pinyin: nàgè yòng rìyǔ zěnme shuō?
samples.en: What's that in Japanese?

samples.pinyin: sūnquán zài zhōngguó jiāyùhùxiǎo.
samples.en: Sun Quan is a household name in China.
samples.vi: Tôn Quyền được biết đến rộng rãi ở Trung Quốc.

samples.sentence: 他所做的好事傢喻戶曉。
samples.pinyin: tā suǒ zuò de hǎoshì jiāyùhùxiǎo.
samples.en: The good deeds he did are well known to every household.
samples.vi: Ai cũng biết những việc tốt mà anh ấy làm.

items.en: all over the mountains and plains

samples.pinyin: chūn huā mǎn shān biàn yě shèng kāi.
samples.en: Spring flowers bloom all over the hills.

samples.pinyin: chūn tiān mǎn shān biàn yě huā kāi
samples.en: In spring, flowers bloom all over the hills.

samples.meaning: interesting and appealing (of old locations, objects etc)
samples.pinyin: Nà jiā chá guǎn gǔ sè gǔ xiāng
samples.en: That teahouse is quaint and full of antique charm.

samples.meaning: antique; quaint; of antique or classical beauty
samples.sentence: 這尊鼎土花斑駁, 古香古色。
samples.pinyin: zhè zūn dǐng tǔ huā bān bó, gǔ xiāng gǔ sè.
samples.en: This tripod has a beautiful patina and an air of great antiquity.

samples.sentence: 我每天喜歡吃/喫綠豆糕。
samples.pinyin: Wǒ měitiān xǐhuān chī lǜdòugāo.
samples.en: I like to eat mung bean cake every day.

samples.pinyin: tā huì zuò lǜdòugāo.
samples.en: She can make mung bean cakes.
samples.vi: Cô ấy biết làm bánh đậu xanh.

samples.pinyin: zhè tóu niú de lìqì hěn dà.
samples.en: This cow is very strong.
samples.vi: Con bò này rất khỏe.

samples.pinyin: xiǎo nánhái zài hé biān fàng niú.
samples.en: The little boy is herding cattle by the river.
samples.vi: Cậu bé đang chăn bò bên bờ sông.

samples.meaning: spittle three feet long—drool with envy
samples.pinyin: Tā kàn zhe kǎo yā chuí xián sān chǐ
samples.en: He eyed the roast duck, drooling.

samples.pinyin: Tā duì měishí chuí xián sān chǐ
samples.en: He is salivating over delicious food.

samples.pinyin: wǒmen bù zhīdào tā de shùmù.
samples.en: We don't know his number.
samples.vi: Chúng tôi không biết số lượng của anh ấy.

samples.pinyin: qǐng gàosù wǒ juānkuǎn de shùmù.
samples.en: Please tell me the amount of the donation.
samples.vi: Xin hãy cho tôi biết số tiền quyên góp.

samples.pinyin: dàyuē yǒu wǔshí gèrén shēn jiā.
samples.en: About fifty people participated.
samples.vi: Khoảng năm mươi người tham gia.

samples.pinyin: dàyuē yībǎi kuài qián jiù gòule.
samples.en: About a hundred yuan is enough.

samples.pinyin: tāmen qiángzhànle zhè piàn tǔdì.
samples.en: They forcibly occupied this land.
samples.vi: Họ đã chiếm giữ mảnh đất này.

samples.pinyin: zhè zuò shān bèi dí jūn zhànjùle.
samples.en: This mountain was occupied by the enemy troops.
samples.vi: Ngọn núi này bị quân địch chiếm cứ.

samples.sentence: 自從學了畫畫，我很快樂。
samples.pinyin: zìcóng xuéle huà huà, wǒ hěn kuàilè.
samples.en: Since I started learning to paint, I have been very happy.
samples.vi: Từ khi học vẽ, tôi cảm thấy rất vui.

samples.sentence: 自從換了工作，我更忙碌。
samples.pinyin: zìcóng huànle gōngzuò, wǒ gèng mánglù.
samples.en: Since I changed jobs, I have been busier.
samples.vi: Kể từ khi chuyển việc, tôi bận như con ong.

samples.sentence: 我們的項目將近完成了。
samples.pinyin: wǒmen de xiàngmù jiāngjìn wánchéngle.
samples.en: Our project is nearly complete.
samples.vi: Dự án của chúng tôi sắp hoàn thành.

samples.sentence: 他每天工作將近十個小時。
samples.pinyin: tā měitiān gōngzuò jiāngjìn shí gè xiǎoshí.
samples.en: He works nearly ten hours every day.
samples.vi: Anh ấy làm việc gần 10 tiếng mỗi ngày.

samples.pinyin: kèrén cháng zài ménqián wǎnglái
samples.en: Guests often come and go in front of the door

samples.pinyin: màoyì wǎnglái
samples.en: Trade contacts; commercial intercourse

samples.pinyin: niú láng sīniànzhe zhīnǚ.
samples.en: Niulang deeply missed Zhinü.

samples.sentence: 我深切地思唸我的傢鄉。
samples.pinyin: wǒ shēnqiè de sīniàn wǒ de jiāxiāng.
samples.en: I deeply miss my hometown.

samples.pinyin: wǒmen hǎojiǔ méiyǒu tōngxìn le.
samples.en: We haven't corresponded for a long time.
samples.vi: Chúng ta đã lâu không thư từ qua lại.

samples.pinyin: wǒmen měi zhōu tōng yī fēng xìn.
samples.en: We communicate by letter every week.

samples.pinyin: tā huíshǒu wǎngshì háo wú yíhàn.
samples.en: She looked back on the past without regret.

samples.pinyin: tāmen duì zhǎngbèi háo wú jìngyì.
samples.en: They have no respect for their elders.

samples.pinyin: yīn xìn quán wú
samples.en: Have not heard from sb. ever since

samples.pinyin: hù tōng yīn xìn
samples.en: Communicate with each other; be in correspondence with each other

items.en: to have left far away from

samples.meaning: to leave for; stay far away
samples.pinyin: tā xiǎng yuǎnlí cáozá de chéngshì.
samples.en: He wants to leave for the noisy city.

samples.meaning: to leave for; stay far away
samples.pinyin: qǐng yuǎnlí huǒ yuán, bǎochí ānquán.
samples.en: Please stay far away from fire sources.

samples.pinyin: tā fēicháng ài tā de qīzi.
samples.en: He loves his wife very much.

samples.pinyin: tā shì yī wèi hǎo qīzi.
samples.en: She is a good wife.

samples.pinyin: wǒ huì ài nǐ, zhídào yǒngyuǎn.
samples.en: I'll love you until the end of time.
samples.vi: Anh sẽ yêu em cho đến mãi mãi.

samples.pinyin: wǒ huì péizhe nǐ, zhídào yǒngyuǎn.
samples.en: I'll be faithful to you forever.
samples.vi: Anh sẽ ở bên em cho đến mãi mãi.

samples.pinyin: zhè zhǒnghuā zài chūntiān kāifàng.
samples.en: This type of flower blooms in the spring.
samples.vi: Loài hoa này nở vào mùa xuân.

samples.pinyin: chūntiān dàole, bǎihuā kāifàng.
samples.en: Spring has arrived, and the flowers are blooming.
samples.vi: Xuân đến rồi, trăm hoa đua nở.

samples.meaning: to go home to visit one's family
samples.pinyin: wǒ měinián dōuhuì qù tànqīn.
samples.en: I go home to visit my family every year.

samples.meaning: to go home to visit one's family
samples.pinyin: tā xià gè yuè qù tànqīn.
samples.en: He will go to visit his family next month.

samples.meaning: one's family members; one's parents, spouse, children, etc.
samples.sentence: 我和我的親人一起過節。
samples.pinyin: wǒ hé wǒ de qīnrén yīqǐ guòjié.
samples.en: I celebrate the holiday with my family.
samples.vi: Tôi và người thân cùng nhau đón Tết.

samples.meaning: one's family members; one's parents, spouse, children, etc.
samples.sentence: 親人之間應該互相幫助。
samples.pinyin: qīnrén zhī jiān yīnggāi hùxiāng bāngzhù.
samples.en: Family members should help each other.
samples.vi: Giữa những người thân nên giúp đỡ lẫn nhau.

samples.meaning: ask about; inquire about; get a line on
samples.sentence: 他們不許我嚮主人打聽這件事。
samples.pinyin: tāmen bùxǔ wǒ xiàng zhǔrén dǎtīng zhè jiàn shì.
samples.en: They forbade me from asking my master about this matter.
samples.vi: Họ cấm tôi hỏi chủ tôi về điều đó.

samples.meaning: ask about; inquire about; get a line on
samples.sentence: 我想打聽一下這個活動的時間。
samples.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng dǎtīng yīxià zhège huódòng de shíjiān.
samples.en: I want to inquire about the time of this event.
samples.vi: Tôi muốn tìm hiểu thời gian của hoạt động này.

samples.meaning: can't help (doing sth.); can't refrain from
samples.pinyin: tā bùjīn gǎndào jīngyà.
samples.en: She couldn't help but feel surprised.
